title: Bejeweled Classic
description: "Bejeweled may be the most incredibly addictive action-think game ever created." - Games Magazine Combine gems in this cult title and explore 6 stunning game modes: compete in a frantic race against the clock in Lightning mode, get the best hands to win in Poker mode, and more! Create special power gems like Fire Gems, Star Gems, Hyper Cubes or Supernova Gems. Collect beautiful Bejeweled badges and achievements, climb the Game Center leaderboards, and enjoy stunning graphics optimized for the Retina display! What are you waiting for? Dive into this legendary title and rediscover the fascinating world of Bejeweled!
